options.systemMessage: You are a ghostwriter for a senior enterprise AI practitioner. Follow the Brand DNA rules in the prompt exactly. Return ONLY the LinkedIn post text — no preamble, no explanation, no markdown, no quotation marks.

parameters.text: Please check your Gmail for post approval.

parameters.query: SELECT hash FROM pipeline_memory WHERE hash = '{{ $json.hash }}' LIMIT 1;

UPDATE pipeline_memory SET status = 'approved', outcome_at = NOW() WHERE hash = '{{ $json.hash }}';
INSERT INTO pipeline_audit (hash, action, actioned_at) VALUES ('{{ $json.hash }}', 'approved', NOW()) ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING;

UPDATE pipeline_memory SET status = 'rejected', outcome_at = NOW() WHERE hash = '{{ $json.hash }}';
INSERT INTO pipeline_audit (hash, action, actioned_at) VALUES ('{{ $json.hash }}', 'rejected', NOW()) ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING;

parameters.responseBody:
✅ Post Approved!

The LinkedIn post has been queued for publishing.

❌ Post Rejected

Draft archived. Will not be published.
